# ReviewHunts

> Discover, compare, and review the best software. Real user reviews, AI-powered insights, and curated buyer guides across 100+ categories.

ReviewHunts helps buyers find the right SaaS tools through verified user reviews, side-by-side comparisons, pricing breakdowns, AI-summarized review digests, and editorial buyer guides.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured software, trending categories, and editor picks.
- [Categories](/categories): Browse all software categories.
- [Search](/search): Search across products, categories, and guides.
- [Compare](/compare): Build side-by-side product comparisons.
- [Compare pricing](/compare-pricing): Pricing matrix across vendors with TCO.
- [Pricing](/pricing): ReviewHunts vendor plans.
- [Leaderboard](/leaderboard): Top-rated and most-reviewed products.
- [Awards](/awards): Annual community-voted software awards.
- [Lists](/lists): User-curated product lists.
- [Tech stacks](/stacks): Community tech stacks.
- [Buyer guides](/guides): Long-form purchasing guides.
- [Glossary](/glossary): SaaS terms and definitions.
- [Discussions](/discussions): Community Q&A and threads.
- [Activity](/activity): Latest reviews, lists, and discussions.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles, comparisons, and industry analysis.
- [Deals](/deals): Active software discounts and promotions.
- [Partners](/partners): Partner directory and link exchanges.
- [Submit a product](/submit-product): Vendors list a new product.

## Optional

- [Choose a plan](/choose-plan): Vendor plan selection.
